allowed_claims: Product can display R12 as a source-backed guarded transfer evidence card.
R12 transfer evidence is secondary and requires customer or field outcome review before any runtime-default update.
R12 has tested effective on public data under guarded hindcast metrics.
R12 has research-only high-risk holdout candidates, but Product default use remains blocked until low-sensitive or customer-approved holdout validation exists.
R12 recall-oriented activation margin can be shown as a research-only improvement with explicit false-alarm and precision tradeoff.
R12 recall-oriented update has a source-backed false-alarm stress boundary and remains Product-default blocked.
R12 false-alarm mitigation can be shown as a research-only candidate, but it needs independent holdout validation.
R12 mitigation holdout validation blocks Product default and preserves the candidate as failure diagnosis evidence.
R12 independent holdout data audit can be shown as a Product evidence boundary, while Product default remains blocked.
R12 external-or-customer holdout ingestion contract is ready, but raw slice and revalidation are still required.
R12 has ingested a DOT ATCR official raw complaint slice for external holdout revalidation preparation.
R12 external holdout revalidation proxy metrics can be shown as diagnostic evidence, while independent prediction validation remains blocked.
R12 has an independent prior-month prediction packet ready for hindcast revalidation, but it is not a pre-outcome locked packet.
R12 independent hindcast revalidation shows positive diagnostic improvement over the static prior, but pre-outcome or field validation is still required.
R12 has locked a pre-outcome prediction trial and defined a customer field revalidation contract, but outcome validation is still pending.
R12 outcome ingestion records that the public target outcome is still pending and the customer field slice contract is ready.
R12 outcome revalidation harness is fail-closed and ready to run once target outcome or customer field slice arrives.
R12 target outcome/customer field slice arrival gate is ready and keeps Product default blocked until revalidation metrics are computed.
R12 customer field slice handoff package is ready for customer data collection, while validation and Product default remain blocked.
R12 customer field feedback update can generate bounded shadow-review candidates from validated field metrics, while Product default remains blocked.
R12 customer feedback shadow replay can evaluate bounded update candidates, while Product default remains blocked.
R12 customer feedback holdout review can gate shadow candidates against independent/customer-approved holdout evidence, while Product default remains blocked.
R12 customer validation workflow can show the current validation stage and operator runbook, while Product default remains blocked.
R12 customer trial readiness package can provide a source-backed trial checklist and operator runbook, while Product default remains blocked.
R12 customer trial operational check verifies template, source registry, and operator runbook, while field validation remains pending.
R12 customer trial launch handoff package can provide a customer-facing data request and submission runbook, while Product default remains blocked.
R12 customer trial launch packet export can provide a customer-readable Markdown handoff packet, while Product default remains blocked.
R12 customer trial launch bundle verification can prove launch packet, handoff, and template files are resolvable, while Product default remains blocked.
R12 customer field slice operator rehearsal can prove the intake command is executable on a synthetic fixture, while customer validation remains blocked.
R12 customer feedback loop rehearsal can prove L22-L26 are executable on a synthetic fixture, while real field validation remains blocked.
R12 customer trial evidence ledger can show a source-backed trial-readiness audit trail, while real field validation remains blocked.

claim_boundary: R12 Product support gate artifact. It allows Product to display a source-backed R12 transfer-validation evidence card as secondary evidence, while preserving guarded baseline primary decisions. It is not Product core method validation, not field validation, and not runtime default authorization.

allowed_display_claims: R12 has a guarded public-proxy transfer signal that can be shown as secondary evidence.
R12 evidence remains runtime-off and requires field or customer outcome review before any default update.
